svg.title: owl repl help screen
svg.desc: Terminal-style REPL help example for owl.
svg.text: owl> help
Hi! I can inspect this repo, read code, edit files, and run commands/tests when needed.
What would you like help with?
- inspect project structure
- explain a file/module
- implement or fix something
- add/update tests
- run lint/tests
- search for specific code
owl> 你有哪些指令
我可以做这些事：
- 查看仓库结构：列出文件/目录
- 读取代码：按文件和行号查看内容
- 搜索内容：查找函数、类、关键字、报错信息
- 修改文件：新建文件、重写文件、精确补丁修改
- 运行命令：执行测试、lint、构建等
- 只读委托：让子代理做有限的只读调查
对应工具大致是：
- list_files(path): 列出文件
- read_file(path, start, end): 读取文件片段
- search(pattern, path): 搜索代码/文本
- patch_file(path, old_text, new_text): 精确替换文本
- run_shell(command, timeout): 运行 shell 命令
